embed.title: Be Accurate and Genuine.
embed.description: Please be sure any answers you submit are your own and are honest answers. Do not steal or use anyone else for your responses, this includes AI. Anyone thought to be using AI Will also be denied.

fields.name: Applications Expectations.
fields.value: Be sure your spelling is as accurate as possible, your responses make sense, and are worded correctly. The better filled out and organized the responses are the faster staff can get through the ticket.

embed.title: Read the Rules
embed.description: By taking this application and submitting a response you acknowledge you have read the rules and agree to them, along with any updates or changes. You understand it is your responsibility to follow them all to the best of your ability. We understand mistakes happen but we will not tolerate blatant disregard for rules.

fields.name: Do not Spam, Bump, or constantly attempt to @ Staff
fields.value: Please understand we get multiple tickets and applications and having applicants spam us does not help our workflow. You will not move up in the line if you do so, we go in order of when the applications come in to keep fairness for everyone.

fields.name: Need to update something or make changes?
fields.value: If you realize you have made an error in your application, want to change something, or add something you have until staff approves or denies your application to do so. Anything changed after will not be taken into consideration, it needs to be done before.
